{{CargoClone
|name=Commander Yuan
|rank=orange
|cabin=2
|id=118
|gene1={race} ATK +50
|gene2={race} TECH +50
|gene3=Rebel Cabin Output +3%
|gene4=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +6
|gene5=Mecha Minion Skin ATK +30%
|gene6=Per 60 Mecha Minions in battle,
Troop Fire DMG +10
|gene7=Mecha Minion Skin ATK +50%
|}}
